title: Tiger Love
writer: Manuel Penella, Howard Hawks, Julie Herne
actors: Antonio Moreno, Estelle Taylor, G. Raymond Nye
plot: The Wildcat, a Robin Hood of the Spanish hills and son of an aristocrat, falls in love with Marcheta, who is pledged to marry Don Ramón to save the family fortune. On her wedding day The Wildcat abducts her and reveals his aristoc...
